title: WATCH KEPT
subtitle: Bayou Lighthouse · long after midnight
epigraph_upright: Solitude, the inner light, the lamp held up for the one who comes after.
epigraph_reversed: Loneliness, the room emptying of meaning around the keeper.
scene_description: The lens turns. The light goes out into the bayou. Nobody comes. Nobody has come for three months. The logbook is up to date.
direction_hint: The light has to be lit. You don't have to be the one who lights it tonight.
opening_log_lines: You arrive at Bayou Lighthouse · long after midnight.
The pressure starts low. It does not stay low.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules. Try [b]MOVE ↪[/b] to walk.
